title: Create brand asset minimum pack v1.0 — wordmark SVG + avatar SVG + brand.md
description: 新建品牌资产最小包: assets/brand/fabric-wordmark.svg (lowercase fabric 风格, 暗示 loom/thread), assets/brand/fabric-avatar.svg (与 Dashboard sidebar 方形 F 一致), docs/brand.md (命名三形式 + 色板 + 字体栈 + tone-of-voice 中英版). 更新 README.md Hero 嵌入 wordmark + 主标语 + 三面分工示意. 前置: TASK-004 (README Hero 已重写, wordmark 嵌入在 Hero 之上).

files.change: SVG wordmark: lowercase 'fabric' text in monospace/geometric sans; loom/thread visual motif (subtle diagonal line or weave pattern); embeddable in README; dark mode compatible (currentColor)
Square icon with 'F' letterform matching Dashboard sidebar boxed F style; brand primary color background; suitable for GitHub avatar and npm icon
Sections: 命名三形式 (fab/Fabric/fabric with usage rules) + 色板 (6 token colors from tokens.css with hex values) + 字体栈 (monospace for CLI, sans for UI) + tone-of-voice (中英双语: 精准/协作/透明)

files.target: Hero section — add wordmark image + three-side diagram
files.change: Add wordmark SVG img tag in Hero; add ASCII or Mermaid 三面分工示意 (AI Agent ↔ Fabric Ledger ↔ Human Developer); verify 主标语 already added by TASK-004

implementation: Read packages/dashboard/src/styles/tokens.css to extract color values (hex) for 6-7 semantic tokens to use in brand.md color palette

Design and create assets/brand/fabric-wordmark.svg: minimal SVG with viewBox; lowercase 'fabric' text element or path; thread/loom motif as subtle decorative element; use currentColor for dark mode support
Design and create assets/brand/fabric-avatar.svg: square viewBox 64x64; boxed 'F' lettermark; primary brand color (#2563EB or equivalent from tokens.css); consistent with Dashboard sidebar appearance

Create docs/brand.md: Section 1 = 命名三形式 with usage rules (fab=binary/lowercase, Fabric=product/titlecase, fabric=wordmark/lowercase); Section 2 = color palette table with token names + hex + usage; Section 3 = typography; Section 4 = tone-of-voice in zh + en
Update README.md Hero: add `![Fabric](assets/brand/fabric-wordmark.svg)` before title; add ASCII diagram showing AI ↔ Fabric ↔ Human three-way collaboration
Verify SVGs are valid: xmllint --noout assets/brand/*.svg or equivalent check

reference.pattern: Minimal SVG brand assets with currentColor dark mode support
reference.examples: Locked naming: fab (CLI binary) / Fabric (product name) / fabric (UI wordmark lowercase)

criteria: assets/brand/fabric-wordmark.svg exists and is valid SVG (contains <svg> root element)
assets/brand/fabric-avatar.svg exists and is valid SVG
docs/brand.md exists and contains all 4 sections: naming forms + color palette + typography + tone-of-voice
README.md Hero section contains wordmark SVG img reference
docs/brand.md contains >= 5 color token entries with hex values
convergence.definition_of_done: 品牌资产最小包完整: 2 SVG 资产可嵌入 README, brand.md 覆盖命名/色板/字体/语调中英版

rationale.chosen_approach: 纯 SVG 资产 (无 PNG) — currentColor 支持主题切换, 可 inline 嵌入 HTML/README; 最小化依赖
decision_factors: locked decision: 命名三形式已锁定 fab/Fabric/fabric
SVG 支持 CSS currentColor 适配暗色模式
README 中 SVG img 标签 GitHub 正确渲染
rationale.tradeoffs: 手工编写 SVG 需要一定设计能力; wordmark 视觉效果取决于 path 质量; loom/thread 暗示可能很微妙

manual_checks: Open assets/brand/fabric-wordmark.svg in browser — renders correctly
Open assets/brand/fabric-avatar.svg — square F icon visible
README.md Hero shows wordmark image on GitHub preview
success_metrics: Both SVG files are valid XML
brand.md >= 3 color palette entries with hex values

commit.message_template: feat(brand): wordmark + avatar SVG + brand.md guidelines
